description_long: This is a marble chessboard with a classic black and white checkered playing surface, bordered by a thick, dark marble frame with subtle white veining. The board is set up for a game, with intricately detailed chess pieces in black and white occupying their starting positions. The chess pieces are stylized, with ornate bases and distinct features for each type, such as crowns for kings and queens, and crenellated tops for rooks. The marble border is polished and slightly raised, providing a luxurious and sturdy frame around the playing area. The overall appearance is elegant and refined, suitable for display in upscale urban parks, plazas, or recreational areas. The chessboard's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the high-quality materials used.
description: A luxurious marble chessboard with a polished black and white checkered surface, bordered by a thick, veined marble frame and set with ornate black and white chess pieces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full chessboard with all black pieces in the foreground and white pieces in the background, highlighting the ornate detail of the black pieces.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the alignment of the chess pieces along the left and right edges, with the marble border and checkered pattern visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white pieces in the foreground and black pieces in the background, showcasing the detail of the white pieces and the board's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the chess pieces aligned along the right and left, providing a clear look at the marble border and the alternating squares.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, each square being perfectly square-shaped and arranged in a classic checkerboard pattern. The border is a thick, dark marble band with white veining, providing a decorative and elegant frame around the grid.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, polished band of dark marble with subtle white veining, giving it a luxurious and sturdy appearance. It is slightly raised above the playing surface and has a smooth, glossy finish with a thin, subtle gold or orange accent line running along the inner edge. No inscriptions or additional ornamentation are visible.
